plan_summary.primary_goal: Design, certify, and distribute a single-SKU consumer Faraday enclosure under the Pragmatic Foundation strategy, reaching €50k net cash from operations by Month 12 to unlock the €350k follow-on funding for a server-grade B2B pivot.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests the Month-12 net-cash margin against the €50k funder trigger; the 2,000-unit ISO-run sell-through margin against the 75% threshold; the Year-1 gross-profit margin against the €120k MIL-STD certification budget; the pre-sale conversion margin against the 5% Issue-1 floor; and the EU EMC certification budget margin against the €80k allocation. Funder trigger renegotiation, EU EMC certification pass, and conductive-gasket supply continuity are treated as unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: Funder Month-12 net-cash trigger
key_values.comment: Below €50k net cash from operations by Month 12 the funder may withhold €350k follow-on; this is the central financial gate of the Pragmatic Foundation.
key_values.source_text: Negotiate a specific, measurable funding trigger: '€50k net cash from operations by Month 12, excluding the initial €400k investment'.

key_values.label: ISO-run sell-through target
key_values.comment: Below 75% sell-through (1,500 of 2,000 units) within 6 months the project is stuck with unsold inventory and the server-grade pivot has no cash.
key_values.source_text: Sell-through at 75% of 2,000 units funds the pivot — success threshold for binary production bet.

key_values.label: MIL-STD-461 certification cost
key_values.comment: Year-1 gross profit must clear the €120k MIL-STD certification cost to fund the server-grade pivot; the two-tier pricing strategy exists to close this gap.
key_values.source_text: Planned €99 retail price generates only €89k gross profit, insufficient to fund the €120k MIL-STD certification.

key_values.label: Pre-sale conversion target
key_values.comment: Expert Issue 1 names 5% pre-sale conversion as the floor needed to justify the ISO run; below this the production bet collapses to inventory overhang.
key_values.source_text: Aim for a conversion rate of at least 5% from targeted traffic to justify the 2,000-unit run.

key_values.label: EU EMC certification budget allocation
key_values.comment: Year-1 budget allocates €80k for CE/EMC certification; Expert Issue 2 names a 30–50% cost-escalation scenario if the product fails initial tests.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Month-12 net cash from operations
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Below the €50k funder trigger the €350k follow-on is withheld; Risk 1 names this as the single largest governance risk in the plan.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Year-1 cash-flow model with realistic retailer net-60 terms + 40% wholesale discount + payment-processor fund holds (per Data Item 4); sensitivity to a 2-month payment delay.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved sell-through on the 2,000-unit ISO run within 6 months
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the binary 2,000-unit bet generates the cash needed for the server-grade pivot; Risk 2 names a €75k+ unsold-inventory scenario if sell-through falls to 50%.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Pre-sale conversion × retailer pull-through × organic D2C; sensitivity to the SurvivalAid.de white-label volume and the €149 premium-tier price elasticity.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Year-1 gross profit across both pricing tiers
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Below the €120k MIL-STD certification cost the server-grade pivot cannot be funded; the two-tier pricing model exists specifically to close this gap.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bottom-up: (pouch units × €79 × pouch_gross_margin) + (enclosure units × €149 × enclosure_gross_margin) - shared overhead; sensitivity to the two-tier mix and €99 baseline cannibalisation.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Observed pre-sale landing-page conversion rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Issue 1 sensitivity: at 2% conversion (vs assumed 5%) pre-sales are 600 not 1,500 units, leaving 1,400 unsold and €105k holding costs.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Per Data Item 3 + 4: A/B test of 10% vs 50% deposits on a pre-order landing page; benchmark against direct-to-consumer European hardware launches in the prepper niche.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved EU EMC certification cost including any re-test cycles
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Expert Issue 2 names a 30–50% cost-escalation scenario if the product fails initial tests; certification cost depletion forces a contingency drawdown that erodes the Month-12 net-cash trigger.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Notified-body quote (TÜV SÜD/Eurofins) × probability-weighted re-test cycles; include pre-compliance testing budget per Issue 2 recommendation.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Month-12 net-cash margin against the €50k funder trigger
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin unlocks the €350k follow-on funding and the server-grade pivot path; negative margin closes the entire growth pathway regardless of any other operational metric.

recommended_first_calculations.label: ISO-run sell-through margin against the 75% threshold
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin clears the production-cash recovery threshold; negative margin produces the €75k+ unsold-inventory scenario that Risk 2 names as the operational failure mode.

recommended_first_calculations.label: MIL-STD certification funding margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin self-funds the €120k MIL-STD pivot path; negative margin forces reliance on the €350k follow-on (already gated by the Month-12 trigger) and risks stalling the B2B strategy entirely.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Pre-sale conversion margin against the 5% floor
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin justifies the 2,000-unit ISO commitment; negative margin invalidates the entire production-scale decision per Expert Issue 1's sensitivity model.

recommended_first_calculations.label: EU EMC certification budget margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin preserves the €20k contingency for marketing and supply-chain surprises; negative margin (Expert Issue 2's 30–50% re-test scenario) directly threatens the Month-12 net-cash trigger.

unmodelled_gates.label: Funder agrees to renegotiate 'positive cash flow' to '€50k net cash by Month 12' by Month 6
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 1 names the vague trigger as the single largest governance risk; without renegotiation the €350k follow-on is at the funder's discretion regardless of any quantitative margin the model evaluates.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: A single late retailer payment or certification slip pushes 'cash flow' negative under the loose definition; funder withholds €350k; server-grade pivot path closes and the €400k Year-1 capital is stranded.

unmodelled_gates.label: Product passes EU EMC certification without requiring fundamental redesign
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 8 and Issue 2 name a redesign event as a €20–40k unbudgeted cost plus 3–6 month delay; certification failure is a binary event the simulation models only via cost overrun, not as a redesign-triggered restart.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Combo-SKU redesign costs €20–40k; market entry delays 3–6 months; the Year-1 revenue window collapses and the Month-12 trigger becomes unreachable regardless of pre-sale conversion.

unmodelled_gates.label: Conductive-gasket and copper-beryllium finger-stock supply remains continuous
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 6 and Issue 3 name an 8–12 week gasket-supply delay as the dominant supply-chain shock; the plan single-sources from a German supplier and the mitigation (qualify two backup suppliers) takes 8–12 weeks itself.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Production halts 4–8 weeks; pre-sale delivery slippage triggers chargeback exposure (Risk 9); cash-flow trigger missed; pivot path closed before Month 12.
